name: case06_regex_job
description: Case 06: Regex log parsing with Visual ETL CustomCode transform
codeGenConfigurationNodes:
{"node-1": {"S3CsvSource": {"AdditionalOptions": {"EnableSamplePath": false, "SamplePath": ""}, "Exclusions": [], "Name": "S3 Text Source - case06_regex", "OptimizePerformance": false, "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": [{"Name": "col0", "Type": "string"}]}], "Paths": ["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case06_regex/"], "QuoteChar": "disabled", "Recurse": true, "Separator": "tab", "WithHeader": false}}, "node-2": {"CustomCode": {"Name": "Regex Extract Transform", "Inputs": ["node-1"], "ClassName": "MyTransform", "Code": "def MyTransform(glueContext, dfc) -> DynamicFrameCollection:
    from pyspark.sql.functions import regexp_extract, col, when, lit, current_timestamp, to_date, trim, length
    from awsglue import DynamicFrame
    from awsglue.dynamicframe import DynamicFrameCollection
    
    keys = list(dfc.keys())
    dyf = dfc.select(keys[0])
    df = dyf.toDF()
    df = df.filter((length(trim(col("col0"))) > 0) & (col("col0").like("%SELECT CID, ODACN FROM DEPODP WHERE CID IN%") | col("col0").like("%WHERE CIF.ACN =%")))
    
    result = df.select(
        regexp_extract(col("col0"), "([0-3][0-9][.][0-9][0-9][.][0-9]{4})", 1).alias("TRANS_DATE_STR"),
        regexp_extract(col("col0"), "([0-2][0-9]:[0-5][0-9]:[0-5][0-9])", 1).alias("TRANS_TIME"),
        regexp_extract(col("col0"), "[[]([0-9][0-9.]+[0-9])[]]", 1).alias("IP_ADDRESS"),
        regexp_extract(col("col0"), "[]] (/[^ ]+)", 1).alias("URL"),
        regexp_extract(col("col0"), "([0-9]+) ms", 1).alias("RESPONSE_TIME"),
        regexp_extract(col("col0"), "P: ([^ ]+)", 1).alias("USER_ID"),
        regexp_extract(col("col0"), "CID IN [(]([^)]+)[)]", 1).alias("CID"),
        regexp_extract(col("col0"), "ACN = ([0-9]+)", 1).alias("CIF"),
        when(col("col0").like("%ERROR%") | col("col0").like("%java%"), lit(1)).otherwise(lit(0)).alias("ERROR_FLAG"),
        col("col0").alias("LOG_TXT"))
    
    result = result.withColumn("TRANS_DATE", to_date(col("TRANS_DATE_STR"), "dd.MM.yyyy")).drop("TRANS_DATE_STR").withColumn("VERSION_DATE", to_date(lit("20260408"), "yyyyMMdd")).withColumn("ETL_UPDATE_DATE", current_timestamp())
    result = result.select("TRANS_DATE", "TRANS_TIME", "IP_ADDRESS", "URL", "RESPONSE_TIME", "USER_ID", "CID", "CIF", "ERROR_FLAG", "LOG_TXT", "VERSION_DATE", "ETL_UPDATE_DATE")
    
    out_dyf = DynamicFrame.fromDF(result, glueContext, "regex_output")
    return DynamicFrameCollection({"regex_output": out_dyf}, glueContext)
", "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": [{"Name": "TRANS_DATE", "Type": "date"}, {"Name": "TRANS_TIME", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "IP_ADDRESS", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "URL", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "RESPONSE_TIME", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "USER_ID", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "CID", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "CIF", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "ERROR_FLAG", "Type": "int"}, {"Name": "LOG_TXT", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "VERSION_DATE", "Type": "date"}, {"Name": "ETL_UPDATE_DATE", "Type": "timestamp"}]}]}}, "node-3": {"SelectFromCollection": {"Name": "Select From Collection", "Inputs": ["node-2"], "Index": 0}}, "node-4": {"S3DirectTarget": {"AutoDataQuality": {"IsEnabled": false}, "Compression": "gzip", "Format": "csv", "Inputs": ["node-3"], "Name": "S3 Gzip CSV Target - case06_regex", "NumberTargetPartitions": "0", "PartitionKeys": [], "Path": "s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case06_regex/load/", "SchemaChangePolicy": {"EnableUpdateCatalog": false}}}}
